notes: Game works the same as on windows with similar performance and the same bugs. The game is running on the glitchy AGS engine. Steam overlay only works in OpenGL or DX9 mode, game might crash if you don't increase the "sprite cache" in games setup. Sometimes the game hangs during launch, so you have to kill the process and start it again. Rating platinum because those are bugs with the game/engine it is running on, the experience is the same as on Windows.
title: The Cat Lady

notes: runs as it should, no performance penalty even supports task switch no problem
title: The Cat Lady

notes: The game would not launch successfully in full-screen unless I either (1) disconnected my eGPU or (2) switched to explicitly using the eGPU with the "DRI_PRIME=1 %command%" launch option. My eGPU is an AMD RX580; it does not appear in the hardware report because Steam isn't launched to use the eGPU itself.
title: The Cat Lady
